things.name: National Museum of Chad
things.description: Chad's largest museum with Sao civilization bronzes, traditional culture and natural history

things.name: Grand Mosque of N'Djamena
things.description: Modern mosque with twin minarets built with Saudi Arabian funding - the largest in Chad

things.name: Chari River Banks
things.description: The confluence of the Chari and Logone rivers with fishing villages and hippo sightings

things.name: Grand Marche Central
things.description: N'Djamena's central market with camels, spices, traditional robes and desert goods

things.name: Zakouma National Park
things.description: Chad's premier wildlife park with the largest elephant herds in Central Africa

things.name: Ennedi Massif
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage sandstone plateau with prehistoric rock art and natural arches

things.name: Lake Chad
things.description: Vast shrinking lake once the size of the Caspian Sea - now a UNESCO threatened site

things.name: Tibesti Mountains
things.description: Remote volcanic massif with Africa's highest peak Emi Koussi at 3415m

things.name: Cameroon Market District
things.description: Cross-border market district on the Cameroon frontier with vibrant trade

things.name: Cathedral of Our Lady of Peace
things.description: French colonial era Catholic cathedral in the heart of the city
